> **PLEASE DO NOT file public security vulnerabilities here.**
> Instead, email security@pangu.dev with the details. This template is for
> internal tracking after a coordinated disclosure.

## Vulnerability Description
Concise description of the vulnerability.

## Impact
- Affected versions:
- Attack vector:
- Severity estimate (CVSS if known):

## Reproduction
Steps or proof-of-concept.

## Suggested Fix
If you have ideas, share them.

## Disclosure Plan
- Date discovered:
- Date reported to vendor:
- Planned public disclosure date:
- Coordinated with: [CVE / GHSA / others]
